name: Irbada Xabadka oo Dempress (NCD)
description: Gurmadka degdega ah ee pneumothorax kacsanaanta iyadoo irbad la geliyo booska labaad ee intercostal. Faragelinta naf-badbaadinta.
steps: Aqoonso pneumothorax kacsan: dhawaaqa neefta maqan ee dhinaca ay saamaysay, tracheal weecan (daahitaan), xanuunka neefsashada, hypotension, JVD.
U muuji laabta dhinaca ay saamaysay.
Soo hel booska 2aad ee intercostal-ka, xariiqda dhexe ee clavicular (ka duwan: 4th/5th ICS, line axillary anterior).
Geli 14g, 3.25-inji irbad-catheter oo ku qotonta gidaarka laabta, wax yar ka sarreeya TOP ee feeraha 3aad (waxay ka fogaataa xirmada neerfaha).
Hore u soco ilaa hawada degdega ah laga dareemo ama foodh la maqlo.
Ka saar irbadda oo kateetarka ku dhaaf meesha.
Dhegayso hagaajinta dhawaaqa neefsiga iyo dadaalka neefsiga.
Hubi xudunta tuubada. Ha isku dhejin ama ha daboolin dhamaadka furan.
Dib u qiimee 5tii daqiqiba kasta -- kateeteradu way qanci kartaa ama xinjiroobin kartaa, una baahan dib-u-dejinta.
warnings: Isticmaal irbad 3.25-inji ah -- heerka 14g angiocatheter (1.5in) ayaa si joogta ah ugu fashilma bukaanada milatariga sababtoo ah hubka jirka iyo muruqa.
NCD-da laba geesoodka ah ayaa laga yaabaa in loo baahdo haddii aan la hubin dhinaca ay saamaysay iyo bukaanku waa la xidhay.
Ha dhigin isla dhinac ka nuugta nabarka xabadka adigoon marka hore xirin dhaawaca.

pediatric.note: Isticmaal irbad cabbirkeedu ku habboon yahay (bukaannada yaryar, 1.5-2in ayaa ku filan). Isticmaal habka 2aad ee ICS MCL. Aqoonsiga astaanta guud ayaa aad u adag -- isticmaal taxaddar.
